description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to run three jobs in parallel: one on ubuntu-latest with g++ and clang++ compilers, one on windows-latest with Visual Studio 16 2019 generator, and one on macOS-latest. For each job, check out the repository, compile tests with cmake and a build tool, and run tests with ctest, all within a build directory.
